tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold docs/<topic>.md skeleton
tasks.description:
Create 14 docs/<topic>.md files with H1 + redirect header; bodies empty. Full body in plan §Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/configuration.md","docs/credentials.md","docs/lifecycle.md","docs/warm-reuse.md","docs/engines.md","docs/cost-and-spend.md","docs/batch-and-grid.md","docs/cloud-stores.md","docs/extending.md","docs/output-layout.md","docs/troubleshooting.md","docs/breaking-changes.md","docs/roadmap.md","docs/releasing.md"],"verifyCommand":"ls docs/{configuration,credentials,lifecycle,warm-reuse,engines,cost-and-spend,batch-and-grid,cloud-stores,extending,output-layout,troubleshooting,breaking-changes,roadmap,releasing}.md","acceptanceCriteria":["All 14 docs/<topic>.md files exist","Each file has H1 + redirect header","Pre-commit clean"],"modelTier":"mechanical","planPath":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-27-readme-rewrite.md","taskNumber":1}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Final acceptance verification
tasks.description:
Run spec Acceptance checks end-to-end: length / Quickstart-Step-1-live / verbs / pixi tasks / docs files / no stale anchors / pre-commit --all-files. Log workstream CLOSED in PROGRESS.md. Full body in plan §Task 15.

{"files":["PROGRESS.md"],"verifyCommand":"set -e ; test \"$(wc -l < README.md)\" -le 500 && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files","modelTier":"standard","planPath":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-27-readme-rewrite.md","taskNumber":15}
